speaker: MATT
raw_text: So Clarota closes his eyes, and kind of goes into a meditative stance. The rest of you, those who have spells to choose, go ahead and choose your spells accordingly for the next day.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was just trying to make an entanglement arrow. It's a trapper's arrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You manage to work out what seems like a tanglefoot bag-type detonation, where if an arrow were fired, it would be a grapple check against the individual, probably give them penalties until they're able to break free of the grapple. So yeah, success on that one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice job, Doogie.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna be Hawkeyeing Laura out at some point, I got a couple of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Before I retire, Clarota, you said you wanted to speak with me later. Anything in particular, or you wish to save it for after the battle?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Perhaps after. I just am curious about the source of your Arcane power."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, I'd be happy to discuss it. I could learn a great deal from you as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Later."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Later, of course. I go to my books.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So as you all have your evening's rest... Not very comfortable. Number one, you're in the middle of a tent of a goblinoid city. Second, just the general proximity of sleeping near an illithid, you just have a general sense of unsettling dreams, imagery that is disturbing. Pike, you have many flashbacks to the vision you had, and actually wake partway through the night in a cold sweat. As you wake up, you all kind of slowly come to, it's about four hours into the evening's rest. You feel a slight tremor, a familiar tremor that you felt once before in this cavern. (rumbling) You feel the ground begin to vibrate and shake.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Before I retire, Clarota, you said you wanted to speak with me later. Anything in particular, or you wish to save it for after the battle?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Perhaps after. I just am curious about the source of your Arcane power."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, I'd be happy to discuss it. I could learn a great deal from you as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Later."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Rub it in. I'm sharpening my ax.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Good. Good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It is good.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just doing my vocal warmups. ♫ Me me me me me me me me me ♫

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm meditating.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: ♫ Molto bene, molto bene, molto bene, molto bene ♫

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The human torch was denied a bank loan. (all laugh)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Heck yeah. All right guys, well, we're gonna take a little bit to set up for the Q and A. Those who can stay, feel free to, those who can't, totally understand. We have kids and families to get to. Those who can will be here for the Q and A for the next hour or so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 826LA probably, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 826LA is who we're raising money for. But yeah all of the 826 store fronts are a little bit different, depending on where you go. They're super cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Guys, please, check it out, it's awesome. It's a good group of people, what they do is fantastic. If you have the opportunity please do, go ahead and donate to the charity.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, thank you guys so much for tuning in for the fourth episode of Critical Role, with the grand return of Pike, our cleric. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Necessary. Glad to have you back, I'm sure everyone here is glad to have the healer back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Especially today.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Very happy today.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And a surprise return of Laura, so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What a time to join the game.
